response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering fundamentals, distributed-systems experience, and recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq. However, his background lacks direct fintech infrastructure experience (e.g., credit risk, payment flows, embedded finance) and scaling engineering teams to 30+ people in high-stakes commercial environments. His agentic AI experience appears more tool-augmented workflows than stateful, multi-agent frameworks with real-time market data integration.
strengths: Deep backend and distributed-systems expertise (event streaming, microservices, high-performance databases)
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, LangGraph-like frameworks)
Proven track record in scaling engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and leadership
concerns: Limited exposure to fintech-specific domains (credit risk, regulatory compliance, embedded finance)
No clear evidence of architecting multi-agent systems for stateful, real-time reasoning over market data
Career gap (2025-present) and relatively short tenure at most firms (max ~3 years), raising concerns about long-term commitment
